content.scenarioHint: 顺口问下，给客户的邮件发了吗？
expectedAnswers: Just checking in—was the email to the client sent?
Did you send the email to the client?
I just wanted to check if you sent the email to the client
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否正确表达了询问邮件状态的意图
语言准确性：语法和用词是否正确
表达自然度：是否符合英语口语习惯

content.scenarioHint: 嘿，你有空发项目更新邮件了吗？
expectedAnswers: Hey, did you get a chance to send the project update email?
Hi, have you sent the project progress email yet?
Hi, have you had a chance to send the project update email?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否正确表达了询问邮件状态的意图
语言准确性：语法和用词是否正确
表达自然度：是否符合英语口语习惯

content.speakerText: Hi, just wanted to follow up—has the weekly status email been sent to the team?
content.speakerTextCn: 嗨，想跟进一下，周报邮件发给团队了吗？
expectedAnswers: Yes, it was sent at 9 a.m. with all the KPIs included.
I'm just finishing it now—I'll send it within the hour.
Not yet, but I've drafted it and will send it after the manager's approval.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否清晰回应了邮件发送状态及后续计划
语言准确性：使用了恰当的时态（现在完成时、将来时）和专业词汇
表达自然度：语气礼貌、结构完整，符合职场跟进语境
关键词覆盖：是否包含 'follow up', 'weekly status email', 'sent', 'team' 等核心词汇
